summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of NotebookLM-like workspace app with AI-powered PPT and Infographic generation. All requested features working correctly with no runtime errors.

design_issues.issue: Export buttons are present in modals but may not be consistently visible in the Studio Outputs cards. However, export functionality works when accessed via generated content modals.

passed_tests: Frontend application loads successfully without errors
Slide Deck generation works without errors - generates structured presentation content
Infographic generation works without errors - creates detailed visual data summaries
Export buttons are present and functional in generated content modals
No runtime errors during content generation process
Bug fix verified: 'itemsToProcess' variable working correctly (no 'slidesToProcess' errors)
High-quality structured output with proper themes and formatting
Modal system working correctly for viewing generated content
Studio workspace UI functioning properly with all generation tools accessible
